stepsSection.headline: Schedule a cross-timezone meeting in 3 steps

seoSection.title1: Global meeting scheduler for international teams
seoSection.body1: Coordinating meetings across different time zones is hard — someone always ends up calculating offsets or sending the wrong time. TimeSync is a free global meeting scheduler that removes the guesswork. Create a room, share the link, and every participant marks their availability in their own local time. The heatmap shows you exactly when your team overlaps.
seoSection.title2: How to find meeting time across time zones
seoSection.body2: Unlike static timezone converters, TimeSync collects real availability from all participants and surfaces the best slots. Whether you're scheduling between Seoul and New York, London and Sydney, or any combination of cities — the overlap heatmap does the work for you. No sign-up, no calendar access required.
seoSection.title3: Free alternative to Doodle and When2Meet
seoSection.body3: Looking for a free time zone meeting planner? TimeSync offers drag-and-drop availability selection, visual heatmaps, real-time updates, and support for 114+ cities worldwide — completely free, with no account needed. Perfect for remote teams, international clients, and anyone who needs to schedule meetings across time zones.

features.title: Everything you need to coordinate global meetings
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for distributed teams across time zones

timezone.title: Smart Timezone Handling
timezone.desc: Auto-detects each participant's timezone. Everyone sees times in their local timezone — zero manual conversion.

heatmap.title: Visual Overlap Heatmap
heatmap.desc: Instantly see which time slots work for the most people with a color-coded availability heatmap.

drag.title: Drag & Drop Selection
drag.desc: Quickly mark your available hours by clicking and dragging — works on desktop and mobile.

realtime.title: Real-Time Collaboration
realtime.desc: See participants join and update their availability live, without refreshing the page.

noSignup.title: Zero Friction — No Sign Up
noSignup.desc: Share a link. Participants join with just their name. No accounts, no passwords, no email required.

export.title: Calendar Export
export.desc: Download a .ics file for your confirmed meeting and add it to any calendar app instantly.

howItWorks.title: How TimeSync works
howItWorks.subtitle: Coordinate your next meeting in 3 simple steps

step1.title: Create a meeting room
step1.desc: Enter a meeting name, your name, and select the candidate dates and time window. Takes under a minute.

step2.title: Share with participants
step2.desc: Copy the unique room link and send it to your team by email, Slack, WhatsApp — whatever you use.

step3.title: Find the best time
step3.desc: Each participant marks their availability. The heatmap updates in real-time showing the best overlap slot.

share.title: How to share your room
share.desc: After creating a room, copy the link from the room page and send it to your participants.

join.title: How participants join
join.desc: Participants open the link, enter their name and timezone, then drag to mark their available times.

results.title: Reading the heatmap
results.desc: Darker cells mean more people are available at that time. The top 3–5 best times are highlighted automatically.
